message:
chore: remove debug eprintln statements from auth, main, and package_manager

Clean up leftover debugging output that was polluting stderr:

src/auth.rs:
- Remove 4 eprintln!("[dbg] lock_file_async: ...") calls from
  the async file locking logic
- Remove inline comments from load_async()

src/main.rs:
- Remove eprintln!("[dbg] ...") statements from the startup path

src/package_manager.rs:
- Remove numerous eprintln!("[dbg] resolve_with_roots: ...") debug
  lines throughout the package resolution pipeline
- Simplify final rx.recv() to chain directly

These debug statements were added during development and should not
appear in user-facing output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
